summary: Minimally invasive mitral valve repair using methods such as right mini-thoracotomy or robotics provides clinically equivalent outcomes compared to traditional open-heart surgery while reducing recovery time and healthcare expenses. These approaches have been validated through multiple studies and can be reliably integrated into standard surgical workflows due to consistent performance across patient populations.
